title: ThermoLoop: AI Data Center Thermal Recycling
description: Closed loop thermal recycling architecture for AI data centers. Four-stage system covering direct to chip cooling, adsorption chiller and ORC waste heat recovery, AI thermal dispatch, and community heat export. 2nd of 4 finalists, $3,000 scholarship awarded.
slides: Pitch presentation, iMasons Denver Mines Scholarship Challenge
Award ceremony, 2nd place finish and $3,000 scholarship

title: Ball Innov8x: Layered Waste Heat Cascade
description: Scope 1 emissions reduction for Ball Corporation's Corvallis, OR facility. Five-layer waste heat cascade recovers 2,180 kW, covering approximately 47% of facility heating demand. 3rd of 8 teams, $700 award.
slides: Pitch presentation, Ball Innov8x Challenge S26
Award ceremony, 3rd place finish out of 8 teams
